title: Manufacturing Engineer - Daikin India International Enterprises - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Daikin India International Enterprises - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Daikin India International Enterprises is actively seeking a talented and motivated Manufacturing Engineer to join our dynamic team in Ranchi. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Daikin India International Enterprises:
Daikin India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in FMEA

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Daikin India International Enterprises!
